Drawn live on YouTube · Official Rules

The prize

What you win.

Seven nights at sea for two on MSC Cruises, balcony cabin, Mediterranean ports, meals and entertainment included. Or take $12,000 cash instead.

  1. 1

    7 nights on an MSC Cruises ship for two.

    Balcony cabin, Mediterranean ports, all-inclusive meals and onboard entertainment. Embark within 60 days of the draw, we coordinate dates with you.

  2. 2

    Flights and transfers coordinated for you.

    We book travel to the embarkation port so you focus on packing, not logistics. Up to $2,000 in airfare included in the package value.

  3. 3

    $12,000 cash equivalent option.

    Prefer not to sail? Take the full cash value instead, wired the same week as the draw, with no cruise booking required.

Package specifications

  • OperatorMSC Cruises
  • Duration7 nights · Mediterranean
  • CabinBalcony · 2 guests
  • IncludesMeals · Entertainment · Excursions credit
  • AirfareUp to $2,000 included
  • Cash option$12,000 wired
  • Total value$12,000

Pack light. Everything's covered.
